case_title: BOSTON, LINDA D VS AUSTIN, GLEN EDWARDS

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAY-22-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLTF'S DECLARATION FILED. DEFT NOT SERVED. REQUEST FOR A NEW DATE: 6/30 3:30PM HRG DATE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOSTON, LINDA D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUSTIN, GLEN EDWARDS $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN, GLEN EDWARDS
(ALSO, DEFT TO REMOVE POSSESSIONS WITHIN 30 DAYS).
AMENDED PLAINTIFF CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT FILED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY BOSTON, LINDA D AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN, GLEN EDWARDS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-30-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-22-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-13-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-06-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CASE CONTINUE PENDING SETTLEMENT. DEFT AGREES TO PAY $100 MO. FOR HIS 1/2 OF CAR DEBT PLUS $100 MO. FOR 7 MOS. OF BACK PAYMENTS TO START 11-10-05. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-06-2006, OFF CALENDAR PLAINTIFF TO AMEND COMPLAINT AND RESERVE THE DEFENDANT A COPY OF THE AMENDED COMPLAINT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN, GLEN EDWARDS
